name: Praline Pecan Crunch
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Cereal (Quaker Oat Squares, Wheat Chex, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Combine cereal and pecans in a 13" x 9" pan.
3. In a 2-cup microwavable bowl, combine corn syrup, brown sugar, and margarine.
4. Heat on high for 90 seconds. Stir.
5. Continue heating on high for an additional 30-90 seconds or until it starts to boil.
6. Stir in vanilla extract and baking soda.
7. Pour the mixture over the cereal and coat evenly.
8. Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 20 minutes.
